'''thodhakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twee|twee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twee|twee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thodhakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhakithi|thodhakithi]] || [[word:thodhakiji|thodhakiji]] || [[word:thodhakishi|thodhakishi]] || [[word:thodhakiki|thodhakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhakuthuthu|thodhakuthuthu]] || [[word:thodhakujuju|thodhakujuju]] || [[word:thodhakushushu|thodhakushushu]] || [[word:thodhakukuku|thodhakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakuthu|thodhakuthu]] || [[word:thodhakuju|thodhakuju]] || [[word:thodhakushu|thodhakushu]] || [[word:thodhakuku|thodhakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakufthuf|thodhakufthuf]] || [[word:thodhakufjuf|thodhakufjuf]] || [[word:thodhakufshuf|thodhakufshuf]] || [[word:thodhakufkuf|thodhakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhakethe|thodhakethe]] || [[word:thodhakeje|thodhakeje]] || [[word:thodhakeshe|thodhakeshe]] || [[word:thodhakeke|thodhakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhakothotho|thodhakothotho]] || [[word:thodhakojojo|thodhakojojo]] || [[word:thodhakoshosho|thodhakoshosho]] || [[word:thodhakokoko|thodhakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakotho|thodhakotho]] || [[word:thodhakojo|thodhakojo]] || [[word:thodhakosho|thodhakosho]] || [[word:thodhakoko|thodhakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakofthof|thodhakofthof]] || [[word:thodhakofjof|thodhakofjof]] || [[word:thodhakofshof|thodhakofshof]] || [[word:thodhakofkof|thodhakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhakĂŠthĂŠ|thodhakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhakĂŠjĂŠ|thodhakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhakĂŠshĂŠ|thodhakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhakĂŠkĂŠ|thodhakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhakathatha|thodhakathatha]] || [[word:thodhakajaja|thodhakajaja]] || [[word:thodhakashasha|thodhakashasha]] || [[word:thodhakakaka|thodhakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakatha|thodhakatha]] || [[word:thodhakaja|thodhakaja]] || [[word:thodhakasha|thodhakasha]] || [[word:thodhakaka|thodhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakafthaf|thodhakafthaf]] || [[word:thodhakafjaf|thodhakafjaf]] || [[word:thodhakafshaf|thodhakafshaf]] || [[word:thodhakafkaf|thodhakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thodhakasha|thodhakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhakshĂ«sha|thodhakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhakrosha|thodhakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhakmusha|thodhakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhakyasha|thodhakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhaknkshĂ«sha|gothodhaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhaknkrosha|gothodhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhaknkmusha|gothodhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhaknkyasha|gothodhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thodhadhakasha|thodhadhakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhadhakshĂ«sha|thodhadhakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhadhakrosha|thodhadhakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhadhakmusha|thodhadhakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhadhakyasha|thodhadhakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhadhaknkshĂ«sha|gothodhadhaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhadhaknkrosha|gothodhadhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhadhaknkmusha|gothodhadhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhadhaknkyasha|gothodhadhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thedhĂŠkasha|thedhĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thedhĂŠkshĂ«sha|thedhĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thedhĂŠkrosha|thedhĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thedhĂŠkmusha|thedhĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thedhĂŠkyasha|thedhĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gothedhĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠknkrosha|gothedhĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠknkmusha|gothedhĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠknkyasha|gothedhĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thodhfakasha|thodhfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhfakshĂ«sha|thodhfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhfakrosha|thodhfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhfakmusha|thodhfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhfakyasha|thodhfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhfaknkshĂ«sha|gothodhfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhfaknkrosha|gothodhfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhfaknkmusha|gothodhfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhfaknkyasha|gothodhfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
